历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 46947 → 5058 → 5568 → 7548 → 30812. In 2021, due to the large scale of the old Gaokao Science category, the ranking was relatively high. From 2022 to 2024, the ranking stabilized in the range of 5000–7500. In 2025, due to the change to the new Gaokao Physics Category and the inclusion of low-score majors from the Malaysia campus, the worst_rank expanded to about 30812. The baseline ranking has fluctuated significantly in the past three years, with the 2025 baseline at about 30812. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category (including Science) in Henan Province: 101 in 2021, 98 in 2022, 63 in 2023, 118 in 2024, 159 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 214, a significant expansion of about 34.6% compared to 2025, which has a mitigating effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 25th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in the 24–26 range in recent years, belonging to a top-tier comprehensive university in China. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving campus safety (voyeurism and theft), employment doubts (difficulty in employment for mathematics graduates), and discrimination against undergraduate backgrounds in re-examinations. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 5th (high heat), with high short video exposure. In 2025, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (continuous deterioration of enrollment situation). Overall public opinion is somewhat negative but with extremely high attention. Chemistry A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A+, Statistics A+, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A, Education A, Law A-, Mathematics A-, Sociology A-, Theoretical Economics A-, Marxist Theory A-, Chemical Engineering and Technology A-, Ecology A, a total of 14 A- and above disciplines, with outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended, highly matching Xiamen University's Physics Category enrollment majors (computer science, electronic information, engineering experimental classes, etc.). In 2026, the total number of ordinary Gaokao examinees in Henan Province is about 1.2 million (a significant increase from 555,000 in the Physics Category in 2025), intensifying competition. Xiamen University is located in Fujian Province (not the home province), with no local enrollment preference in Henan Province. Fujian is a coastal province, with a certain regional appeal to Henan examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of about 30812, the significant enrollment expansion of 34.6% in 2026 (mitigating competition), the substantial increase in the total number of examinees in Henan Province (intensifying competition), the somewhat negative reputation but high Douyin heat (high attention), and other factors; the downward effect of expansion on ranking (ranking number increases) and the upward effect of increased examinees roughly offset each other. The predicted minimum ranking is about 37207, with a range of 36707–37707.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Nanqiang College Excellence Leadership Class)
- Statistics (Economic Statistics, Statistics, Data Science)
- Engineering Experimental Class (AI and Computer Science)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Integrated Circuits and Electronic Information)
- Science Experimental Class (Medical)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace and Intelligent Manufacturing)
- Economics (Including Dual Bachelor's Degree Programs).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Marine and Ecological Environment)
- Science Experimental Class (Life Sciences and Medical Health)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chemical Engineering and Materials)
- Architecture (Human Settlement Science and Innovation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 36707–37707, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. Tier 1 Engineering Experimental Class (Nanqiang Leadership Class/AI and Computer Science) and Statistics are the most competitive, requiring a ranking significantly better than the upper limit of the range. Tier 2 majors such as Integrated Circuits and Electronic Information, and Medical offer good value. Tier 3 majors such as Marine/Ecology/Chemical Engineering have a high probability of admission, suitable for examinees interested in related fields.
